scripts.restart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\stop-running.ps1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $nodePath = (Get-Command node).Source; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath $nodePath -ArgumentList @('src\scheduler.js') -WorkingDirectory (Get-Location)"
scripts.refresh: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\stop-running.ps1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $nodePath = (Get-Command node).Source; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath $nodePath -ArgumentList @('src\scheduler.js') -WorkingDirectory (Get-Location); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; node .\src\run-once.js"
